extraction_reasoning: The litigation table lists criminal litigation of 3 against the Company, but the footnote states all three were filed by the Company, so criminal cases against are 0; statutory/regulatory actions against are 2 for the Company, 5 for subsidiaries, 1 for Promoters and 1 for Directors, totaling 9, while tax proceedings against the Company and subsidiaries are 24 (the Promoter and Director tax rows are excluded). For the quantified aggregate against the Company and subsidiaries, I included the Company's material civil litigation of ₹35.43 million and tax proceedings of ₹263.78 million, excluded the Company's ₹2.70 million criminal amount because those cases were filed by the Company, and excluded all Promoter and Director matters; the resulting ₹299.21 million converts to ₹29.921 crore. Contingent liabilities are disclosed as line items as of June 30, 2021, with no stated Total row; summing the six disclosed items gives ₹94.48 million, or ₹9.448 crore, but the source does not provide an explicit total. The only customer concentration disclosure is for the top 20 customers, not top 5 or top 10; the disclosed percentages are company-wide revenue from operations for full Fiscal 2021, but they cannot be used for the requested top-5/top-10 fields. Litigation and contingent-liability tables use ₹ million, converted to crore at 10 million per crore.
